circle.style: animation:fB 5s ease-in-out infinite;fill:rgb(30, 77, 107);stroke:none;color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:0.35;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
